packageRules.description: Never automerge release-please PRs - manual review required
Automerge patch and minor updates for low risk

OpenTelemetry: update core (v1.x) and the 0.x log modules together in ONE PR and never automerge - a core bump without the log modules (or vice-versa) breaks the build. This rule is last so it overrides the broad patch/minor automerge above for these packages.
Never automerge pre-1.0 (0.x) Go module minor/patch updates - a 0.x minor can be breaking (e.g. the otel log modules).

Ignore the self-module reference: the tools/* modules `require github.com/rknightion/tailscale2otel` but `replace ../..` makes Go always build from local code, so the require version is cosmetic. Bumping it on every release (see PR #19) is pure noise. Last rule so enabled:false is never re-enabled by the broad automerge rules above.
